info.description: Editable content for the storefront landing page

hero_subtitle.default: Hand-curated, quality-verified products for those who refuse to compromise. Secure founding member pricing before stock runs out.

value_prop_problem.default: Most online stores overpromise and underdeliver.

value_prop_answer.default: We built Premium around what actually matters — hand-curated quality, 24-hour rapid shipping, and dedicated human support. Every product earns its place through rigorous testing. No fluff. No fillers. No compromises. Just products that work exactly as advertised.

default.title: Local Warranty
default.desc: Your purchase is protected. No overseas runaround, no fine print, no exceptions.

default.title: 24hr Shipping
default.desc: Orders before 2 PM ship same day. Inside Dhaka delivery in under 24 hours.

default.title: Verified Reviews
default.desc: Real buyers, real results. Every review comes from a verified purchase only.

default.title: Secure Checkout
default.desc: 256-bit encryption with bKash and COD support. Your data stays locked.

default.title: Human Support
default.desc: Real people, fast responses. No chatbots, no ticket queues, no runaround.

default.title: Easy Returns
default.desc: 30-day no-questions-asked refund policy. Full protection on every order.

offer_subtitle.default: Use code at checkout. Founding price — once stock runs out, it's gone.
